title: catabrosa aquatica subsp. pseudairoides
intro: Catabrosa aquatica subsp. pseudairoides, also known as sedge or water sedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Catabrosa aquatica subsp. pseudairoides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
